creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

… I mean, seeking the configuration within zpool.cache might be a good first step towards diagnosis.

Is it present in the file?

Which version of FreeBSD, exactly?

----

Side note: on my 14.0-current machine I found an archaic (March 2022)
/boot/zfs/zpool.cache
that comprised the config for a previously used boot pool.

Also present, and correct (true to what was recently imported): 
/etc/zfs/zpool.cache
